text: It's rich. Hey, how are you doing? Good. It's Samantha calling from Wellness Direct. Thanks for picking up. Actually, there's a painless glucose monitor that tracks your sugar all day. No fingerprints. To see if you qualify for this, do you have Medicare Part A and B? No, I'm sorry I do not. I appreciate your time. Enjoy.
